title: cinnamomum altissimum
intro: Cinnamomum altissimum, also known as Chinese camphor or Taiwan camphor, is a type of evergreen tree native to Taiwan and parts of China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cinnamomum altissimum include relieving pain and reducing fever, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Cinnamomum altissimum is often used in the form of essential oils, teas, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
